title: aureolaria pectinata subsp. transcedens
intro: Aureolaria pectinata subsp. transcedens, also known as the twisted red ragwort, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Orobanchaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The twisted red ragwort has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
